Mobile drawer shipped as <dialog open> (non-modal) — no native focus trap, no ::backdrop, no aria-modal, hand-rolled JS backdrop. Native showModal()/close() gives all four for free. Caught by code-reviewer.

Hand-rolled focus trap stole focus to triggerRef on every initial mount because !open branch fires on initial render where open=false. Needs wasOpenRef guard so focus only returns on open→closed transition.
onMouseEnter/onMouseLeave without (pointer: fine) media-query guard fires on iOS Safari + Android Chrome first-tap. CSS-only @media (hover: hover) and (pointer: fine) is the idiomatic fix.

localStorage read in initial render = SSR hydration mismatch + FOUC on hard reload. Fix: read in useEffect (deferred state), or inline <head> script that sets a body data-attribute pre-hydration (next-themes pattern).

aria-label for branded acronyms must force phonetic split. Screen readers pronounce all-caps single tokens as words ("AIGIST" → "ageist"). Use aria-label="AI GIST" (with space) to force two-syllable announcement. Visual rebrand to differentiate the brand is undone for AT users if the aria-label is left as the all-caps wordmark.

Quebec French (fr-CA) translation conventions not documented. "Étendre la barre latérale" reads as "extend its size" — Quebec usage prefers "Déployer" or "Ouvrir" for UI affordance "expand". GoC fr-CA audiences need native-speaker review on UI verbs.

Changesets excludes the root package in a pnpm workspace where root has private:true and isn't in pnpm-workspace.yaml. Listing "rootname": minor in the changeset fails with "package X which is not in the workspace". Root version must be bumped manually + README badge updated via the existing update-version-badge.js script after `pnpm changeset version`.
